message:
fix(ci): add bd skip check to conformance tests

All 220 conformance tests now skip gracefully when the bd (Go beads)
binary is not available, preventing CI failures in environments where
only br (Rust beads) is built.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.3"
+version = "0.1.4"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"

@@ -2,4 +2,4 @@
 source: tests/snapshots/cli_output.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stdout)
 ---
-br version 0.1.2 (dev) (BRANCH@GIT_HASH)
+br version 0.1.4 (dev) (BRANCH@GIT_HASH)
